translations.en: a short, heavyset man dressed in rags.
translations.zh: 一位身材矮胖、穿著破爛的男子。

translations.en: "I ain't talkin' to you, you're just like all the rest!"
translations.zh: 「俺不跟汝說話，汝跟那些人一個樣！」

translations.en: "I'll never crack, no matter 'ow many times you come back!"
translations.zh: 「俺絕不鬆口，不管汝來多少次！」

translations.en: "All right, I give up."
translations.zh: 「好吧，俺認了。」

translations.en: "The rune is 'idden under a potted plant at the Slaughtered Lamb."
translations.zh: 「聖符藏在宰羊酒館一盆盆栽下面。」
translations.note: h-dropping dialect preserved as rough speech

translations.en: "Now go away and leave me alone."
translations.zh: 「現在走開，讓俺清靜清靜。」

translations.en: "$G! Am I glad to see thee!"
translations.zh: 「$G！見到汝真是太好了！」

translations.en: "You're me last light in a world of darkness."
translations.zh: 「汝是俺在黑暗世界裡最後的一絲光明。」

translations.en: "Who's there?" the thief calls insolently.
translations.zh: 「誰在那裡？」盜賊傲慢地叫道。

translations.en: The thief's tone becomes more respectful as he recognizes you.
translations.zh: 盜賊認出汝後，語氣頓時變得恭敬了許多。

translations.en: "'Strewth, it's the Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「老天，是聖者！」

translations.en: "You've got to get me @out of 'ere, $G!"
translations.zh: 「汝得把俺弄@出去，$G！」

translations.en: "I admit I robbed that grave."
translations.zh: 「俺承認俺盜了那個墓。」

translations.en: "But it were only because 'is Lordship wouldn't be needin' that stuff no more."
translations.zh: 「但那只是因為大人已用不著那些東西了。」

translations.en: "I 'ad me @kids to feed, didn't I?"
translations.zh: 「俺要養活俺的@孩子，不是嗎？」

translations.en: "I'll tell you where the rune is if you'll let me @go. I've got me kids to think of."
translations.zh: 「只要讓俺@走，俺就告訴汝聖符在哪裡。俺得為俺的孩子著想。」

translations.en: Tears fill the man's eyes.
translations.zh: 男子眼眶泛紅。

translations.en: "My poor children've got no one to take care of them now."
translations.zh: 「俺那可憐的孩子現在沒人照顧了。」

translations.en: "I only stole to feed them, and that's the @truth."
translations.zh: 「俺偷竊只是為了養活他們，這是@實話。」

translations.en: "True? Of course it's true!"
translations.zh: 「真話？當然是真話！」

translations.en: "Even a thief like me wouldn't lie to the Avatar."
translations.zh: 「就算俺是個盜賊，也不會對聖者說謊。」

translations.en: "All right, I admit it. I 'aven't got any kids."
translations.zh: 「好吧，俺承認。俺根本沒有孩子。」

translations.en: "But that stupid cow they got runnin' this place won't listen to reason--a little give-and-take, know what I mean?"
translations.zh: 「但那個管這地方的蠢女人根本不講理——互相讓步，知道俺的意思嗎？」

translations.en: "I tell you what."
translations.zh: 「俺告訴汝吧。」

translations.en: "If I tell you where the rune is, will you take it away?"
translations.zh: 「如果俺告訴汝聖符在哪裡，汝會把它帶走嗎？」

translations.en: "I don't want these pompous blighters to 'ave it. Okay?"
translations.zh: 「俺不想讓那些自命不凡的傢伙拿到它。好嗎？」

translations.en: "You mean it, $G? Are they gonna let me go 'ome?"
translations.zh: 「$G，汝說真的？他們要讓俺回家了？」

translations.en: "Me name's Boskin, $G."
translations.zh: 「俺叫博斯金，$G。」

translations.en: "I'm but a poor farmer, forced into crime by the harshness of these times."
translations.zh: 「俺不過是個窮苦農夫，被這亂世逼得走上歪路。」

translations.en: "There weren't no other way to feed me family, $G!"
translations.zh: 「俺別無他法養活家人，$G！」

translations.en: "Please, $G! Tell them to let me @go 'ome!"
translations.zh: 「求汝，$G！告訴他們放俺@回家！」

translations.en: Tell them about me poor fatherless @kids! They'll listen to you!"
translations.zh: 告訴他們俺那些可憐的@孤兒！他們會聽汝的！」

translations.en: "Beg your pardon, $G?"
translations.zh: 「$G，請問汝說什麼？」

translations.en: "Then the gargoyles can take the lot of you!"
translations.zh: 「那就讓魔像族把汝們統統帶走吧！」

translations.en: "You'll never get nothin' out of me!"
translations.zh: 「汝休想從俺這裡得到任何東西！」

translations.en: "All right, I'll take your word for it."
translations.zh: 「好吧，俺相信汝的話。」

translations.en: "Go to the Slaughtered Lamb; I 'id the rune under a potted plant there."
translations.zh: 「去宰羊酒館；俺把聖符藏在那裡一盆盆栽下面。」

translations.en: "And spit on Her Ladyship for me!"
translations.zh: 「還有，替俺朝那位大人吐口水！」

translations.en: His face falls. "Then I ain't sayin' nothin'. I've got me kids to think of, I do."
translations.zh: 他神情黯然。「那俺什麼都不說。俺得為俺的孩子著想，俺真的得。」

translations.en: His face lights up. "I knew I could count on you, $G!"
translations.zh: 他神色一亮。「俺就知道可以信任汝，$G！」

translations.en: "And I'll keep my end of the bargain."
translations.zh: 「俺也會履行俺這邊的協議。」

translations.en: "I 'id the rune under a potted plant in the Slaughtered Lamb inn."
translations.zh: 「俺把聖符藏在宰羊酒館裡一盆盆栽下面。」

translations.en: As you leave, Iolo whispers to you.
translations.zh: 就在汝離去之際，尤洛悄聲對汝說。

translations.en: "Maybe it was necessary, $P, but lying makes me uneasy. Even to someone like him."
translations.zh: 「$P，也許這是必要的，但說謊讓吾渾身不自在。即使對象是這樣的人。」

translator_notes: 博斯金是個關在尤城監牢的盜賊，說話帶市井腔（俺）。他聲稱有家人要養，但被拆穿後承認是謊言。知道正義聖符藏在宰羊酒館盆栽下。最後尤洛的旁白台詞以「吾」自稱，符合同伴身份。
